Deals ??? P.DMG 3 times to frontal enemies, and each attack has a [ (removed) 8% Physical Damage taken/stacks up to 3 times] 100% chance of knocking them down for [1 sec->2 sec].

light.unified: Increase P.DMG that the target takes by 25% for 10 sec.

Removes ATK Spd debuff effect and adds a 3 sec Stun.

light.unified: Increases ATK by 0.5% for 10 seconds upon a Crit Hit. This effect can be stacked up to max 100 times.

description.unified: [Roll Over] increases DMG by {0}% on every use and recovers 120 MP upon a Crit Hit. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
[Miruru Pirates!] DMG is increased by 50%, and skill cooldown is reduced by {0}%.
[Boooooooom!] Increases DMG by 50%. Upon activation, increases ATK Spd by [{0}%->{0}] for 3 sec.

dark.unified: Miruru stacks Darkness depending on the number of enemies she hits. When she reaches 50 stacks, she goes berserk, boosting her Atk Spd by [48%->800] and her ATK by [25%->20%].

description.unified: Deals P.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK to the enemies inflicted by the Boooooom! skill at a [30%->50%] chance, and the target takes {1}% more P.DMG for 10 seconds.
